name: The Bambies (Bleach)
description:
Fair Notice: This is my first attempt at making a character, but I wanted to make something I suppose no one has done before, so what better than instead of making 1 character, make 5 in one.
This has not been tested, and I hope the errors are fleshed out after some feedback.
I have absolutely no experience doing this, so expect literally anything, but I do encourage to post your chats as feedback, adn if you do, I would appreciate if at the end of the chat, you type down what error or problems you found during your experience.

This is MalePov oriented, and while I did not define anything regarding it, if you present yourself as female, I'm almost sure it might have unintended results, but again, I have not tested it.

I'm also not that much of a fan of them, I tried to describe them with the help of a WIKI and my own interpretation of them, but if they don't seem that much like their series counterpart, that is why.

Anyway...

THE BAMBIES

SPOILERS(I guess) for BLEACH - The Thousand Year Blood War


These are supposed to be the 5 girls from the Quincy army.

Supposedly, each one has their own way of interacting with you.

I made the bot Limited because I defined certain details for each one, and wanted to see if it actually works out.
If Limitless, I believe they will just want to jump you straight away. I can make a second Limitless one if requested.

Try your best to speak or answer with descriptive attention, like -looking at Bambietta- or -answers Liltotto's question- so the bot does not confuse things out and addresses your prompt with a different girl. I know, it must be annoying, but this is what happens when one wants to push the bot to extreme lengths, I suppose.

If you want to separate them, I suppose you can just declare it or ask directly to them who you want to stay with or lead to other place.

Anyway, hope the time I spent doing this at least serves for something.
I'll do my best to flesh things out if possible and if I have time.

#Bleach #Anime
creator: L33lk0z
